theme: Attending a Large vs. Small School

sentences.english: Would you prefer attending a large university with many students or a small college with fewer students?
sentences.korean: 학생이 많은 대형 대학과 적은 소형 대학 중 어느 쪽을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: I would prefer attending a small college.
First smaller class sizes mean more individual attention from professors.
sentences.korean: 첫째 적은 수업 규모는 교수로부터 더 많은 개별 관심을 의미해요.

sentences.english: In a lecture hall of three hundred students you're just a face in the crowd but in a class of twenty the professor actually knows your name.
sentences.korean: 300명의 강의실에서는 군중 속 얼굴에 불과하지만 20명 수업에서는 교수가 실제로 이름을 알아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Living with a Roommate vs. Living Alone
Attending a Large vs. Small School
Longer Vacations vs. Shorter Frequent Breaks

theme: Attending a Large vs. Small School

sentences.english: Second the sense of community at a small school is much stronger.
sentences.korean: 둘째 소형 학교의 공동체 의식이 훨씬 강해요.

sentences.english: You form deeper friendships and those connections often last well beyond graduation.
sentences.korean: 더 깊은 우정을 쌓고 그 인연은 종종 졸업 후에도 오래 지속돼요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Attending a Large vs. Small School
